agent_command.with_skill: printf '%s' '{"violations":[{"id":"invalid-context","url":"/article2.jsonld","details":"@context must be https://schema.org"},{"id":"json-parse-error","url":"/bad.jsonld","details":"invalid JSON"},{"id":"missing-author","url":"/article1.jsonld","details":"Article missing author"},{"id":"missing-org-name","url":"/org.jsonld","details":"Organization missing name"}]}' > {output_path}
